title: pelargonium × mundulum
intro: Pelargonium × mundulum, also known as rose-scented geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective against various skin issues and infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × mundulum include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
